notableEvents.label: Jeremiah Jackson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jeremiah Jackson grounds into a double play, third baseman Miguel Vargas to second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Coby Mayo out at 2nd. Jeremiah Jackson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Coby Mayo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Coby Mayo grounds into a double play, second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Ryan Mountcastle out at 2nd. Coby Mayo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by catcher Adley Rutschman on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Lenyn Sosa pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Lenyn Sosa grounds out sharply, shortstop Gunnar Henderson to first baseman Pete Alonso. Munetaka Murakami scores.
